contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: AWS account 767697632458 — monthly DB backup automation + security group remediation
    (AWS support case 177613748700177 follow-up)                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                    
    1. Monthly EBS snapshot workflow (krake + seni_sql databases)                                                                   
       - Python script + GitHub Actions, runs 1st of each month                                                                     
       - Uses dedicated IAM user (database_backup) with scoped EC2-only permissions                                                 
       - PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/11                                                                 
                                                                                                                                    
    2. Security group + key pair sweep across all 17 AWS regions                                                                    
       - Deleted attacker-planted "sec-hhs" SG from 16 regions                                                                      
       - Deleted 13 region-named key pairs (attacker-staged)                                                                        
       - Deleted 8 orphaned launch-wizard SGs in us-east-1 incl. world-open RDP/MSSQL                                               
       - Revoked broad TCP/UDP 0-65535 ingress from us-west-1 default SG                                                            
       - Zero production instances affected                                                                                         
       - Full sweep report + retained-SG rationale committed to docs/aws-reports/                                                   
       - PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/12                                                                 
                                                                                                                                    
    3. AWS support case reply draft                                                                                                 
       - Paste-ready response for Vignesh P. covering all follow-up items                                                           
       - PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/13                                                                
              https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/14
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
